runTitle: Codex 직접 재검증 — v8.12.46 P4/P13 AI Assistant fixes
coveredSurfaces: ai-chat Q-NEW38 P4 RCA routing direct retest
ai-chat Q-NEW34 P13 multi-metric comparison direct retest

expertAssessments.rationale: Codex 직접 재검증에서 P4/Q-NEW38은 일반 대화가 아닌 서버 실시간 데이터 분석 + 분석 근거로 응답했고, P13/Q-NEW34는 CPU+메모리+디스크 3개 지표를 모두 반환했다.
응답이 현재 OTel 스냅샷 기준으로 잘못된 사용자 전제(CPU 높음)를 정정하고 현재 CPU 28% 정상 범위를 명시했다.

artifacts.label: Codex direct P4/P13 AI assistant retest evidence
artifacts.note: Observed prompts, rendered evidence labels, route/tool markers, and version/health metadata.

notes: User-requested direct retest on an already-counted v8.12.46 production deployment; countsTowardSummary=false prevents duplicate aggregate inflation.
P4 prompt used a high-CPU premise, but live data reported CPU 28%, so the desired behavior is premise correction plus evidence-based RCA path, not forcing a high-CPU answer.
P4 response displayed the UI badge '응답 느림'; exact latency was not measured in this retest.
